falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom was followed by a grinding recovery, not a V-shaped reversal exceeding prior highs; a close above 5,600 would signal a blowoff/melt-up rather than a bottoming pattern, making the 79% similarity meaningless

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 40 implies elevated volatility and stress; sustained VIX compression below 12.50 would indicate complacency returning and invalidate the stress/bottoming thesis, proving the signal was not a bottom but a false alarm

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-Year Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A bottom_2024_aug analog requires a specific macro backdrop (growth scare with rates in a range); a sustained sub-3.80% 10Y would indicate a flight-to-safety recession panic rather than a growth-scare bottom, breaking the pattern's required macro conditions

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
